business_meaning.pd_internal_selected_threshold: Threshold interno de screening/seleccion PD usado en busqueda y analisis tecnico.
business_meaning.pd_internal_fallback_threshold: Fallback interno tomado de la policy de fairness durante la busqueda de threshold PD.
business_meaning.fairness_primary_threshold: Threshold operativo principal para auditoria de fairness y narrativa de aprobacion.
business_meaning.decision_policy_global_threshold: Threshold operativo global aplicado por la policy de decision/aprobacion.

set_prediction.promotion_rationale: Conformal triage guardrail: binary set prediction provides distribution-free abstention mechanism. Grade A has 86% singleton rate (clear decisions); 5 grades have >40% singleton rate. Overall coverage 89.8%. Promoted as complementary guardrail to PD point + conformal intervals.
set_prediction.promotion_note: Binary conformal set prediction promoted as triage guardrail. When predicted set = {{0,1}}, the loan is ambiguous and may be deferred to human review — especially informative for Grade A (low ambiguity rate).

notes: Rare-event calibration audit is diagnostic; it should inform PD selection but not replace the core champion metric stack.
Coverage-by-group should be interpreted jointly with fairness/governance, without collapsing validity into fairness claims.

mapie.notes: Primary conformal library for PD intervals, LGD/EAD candidates, and ACI/EnbPI benchmarks.

crepes.notes: Kept for p-values/predictive systems. Not used as a Venn-Abers substitute.

variant_selection.strict_diagnostics_role: Kupiec/Christoffersen remain strict diagnostics in validate_conformal_policy.py; they are not the primary selector here.

top_variants.implementation_note: Cross conformal executed on calibrated score space with a lightweight linear regressor.

time_series.interval_selector_reason: interval champion selected from eligible families under the governed coverage-gap policy; adaptive and conformal statistical candidates remain diagnostic unless they satisfy the same thresholds.

adaptive_method_status.notes: Adaptive methods remain diagnostic until they beat the official interval policy.

final_interval_decision.reason: interval champion selected from eligible families under the governed coverage-gap policy; adaptive and conformal statistical candidates remain diagnostic unless they satisfy the same thresholds.

model_shift.pvalue_interpretation: Both structural shift and predictive degradation are present. This combination deserves the strongest governance posture.
